title: The Night Attack on Iceburg
description: Water Seven turns against the Straw Hats as Robin’s disappearance and Iceburg’s attack make the crew appear guilty.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Nico Robin, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Luffy. Water Seven turns against the Straw Hats as Robin’s disappearance and Iceburg’s attack make the crew appear guilty.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Wait there. I'll come over to you.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Er... What are you saying, Nico Robin- chan?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: For me, it is the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That woman is always the sole survivor.

summary: Water Seven turns against the Straw Hats as Robin’s disappearance and Iceburg’s attack make the crew appear guilty.
